title: lantana × planaltensis
intro: Lantana × planaltensis, also known as Lantana, is a popular flowering plant native to the Americas, characterized by its clusters of small, fragrant flowers and a shrub-like appearance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, antifungal, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lantana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Lantana can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in aromatherapy due to its calming and soothing effects.
